cast.name: 马修·布罗萨德 Matthew Broussard

introduction: In his hilarious and razor-sharp debut full-length comedy special, Hyperbolic, Matthew Broussard masterfully navigates a maze of topics, blending clever penmanship with unapologetic introspection. A Southern Jewish Cajun navigating life in New York City, Matthew shares side-splitting anecdotes about cultural quirks, family dysfunction, and the absurdities of modern masculinity.
